pageContext.name: Soldier Amazon (Black)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and TBLeague are proud to present the Soldier Amazon (Black) Sixth Scale Figure. This figure is of a proud and vital frontline soldier of the Amazonians and comes with a variety of accessories as any prepared soldier should. Featuring TBLeague's iconic seamless body as new, unique features and weapons, the Soldier Amazon will make a fine addition to any collection!
